name: sf-streaming-monitor
description: Salesforce Streaming Monitor — back-end + front-end launcher

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "server,web" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently --names "server,web" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "ALLOW_MOCK=1 npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix web run typecheck
